titleStmt.title: SII 41.331: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 331. (A.R. No. 546 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the north base of the central shrine the Kariyamāṇikka Perumāḷ temple at Vijayamaṅgalam.

summary.p: Records a gift of money (29 achchu) by Chiṟiyān Dēvan alias Muḍikoṇḍachōḻa-mārāyan, a Veḷḷāḷa of Chāttandai clan of the village for offerings in the temple of Tirumēṟkōyil Chittiramēḻiviṇṇagarāḻvār in Vijayamaṅgalam in Kuṟuppu-nāḍu. The gift is placed under the protection of the ‘ninety-nine’ belonging to the left hand (iḍangai).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . naṉmaṅkalañ ciṟakka kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa ccakravattikaḷ śrīvirarājentradevaṟkut tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellāniṉṟa tiruna
lliyāṇṭu pattāvatu Aippicait tiṅkaḷil kuṟuppuṉāṭṭu vicaiyamaṅkalattut tirumeṟkoyil cittirameḻi viṇṇakarāḻvāṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟukku Irupattoṉpataccu E
mperumāṉ śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukka Ivvamutupaṭi nittam ṉāṉāḻiyariciyamutupaṭi ceyvatāka kalveṭṭuvitteṉ vicaiyamaṅkalattu veḷḷāḷaṉ cāttantaikaḷil ciṟiyāṉ tevaṉāṉa
muṭikoṇṭacoḻa mārāyaṉeṉ darmmañ cantrādityavarai celvatākavu mittaṉmam Iṭaṅkai toṇṇūṟṟoṉpatu Here some letters are scraped out. rakṣai Idharmma Iṟa
kkuvāṉ vaḻivaḻi yeḻeccamaṟuvāṉ .
Digital edition of SII 41.331 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
